Wiki / Locations & world

Locations, countries & research

Grow the physical footprint of your empire, unlock multipliers around the globe, and spend XP on a research tree that compounds with everything else.

Real estate

10 location types

Each location adds passive income, staff capacity, and a monthly rent. You can own up to 50 locations (raised by the Location Slots upgrade), name them, and assign each to a country.

LocationBase costBase incomeStaff capRent / mo
Milkshake Cart$120$1/s1$5
Food Kiosk$550$4/s1$20
Street Stand$1.8K$10/s2$50
Corner Shop$23K$80/s6$400
Diner$225K$650/s15$3K
Market Outlet$3.8M$7.5K/s40$35K
Mall Flagship$75M$80K/s100$380K
Full Restaurant$600M$700K/s250$3.5M
Franchise Branch$12B$8M/s600$38M
Corporate Tower$300B$100M/s2,000$470M

Per-location extensions

ExtensionEffect per levelMax level
Seating+3 staff capacity, +$15/s5
Kitchen+1 staff capacity, +$80/s5
Drive-Thru+5 staff capacity, +$400/s3
Delivery+$2,000/s3
Storefront+2 staff capacity, +$10,000/s3
Going global

35 countries

Global expansion opens at Level 15. Each country you unlock multiplies all of your income; their multipliers combine with diminishing returns, so breadth and depth both matter.

CountryMultiplierTier
USA×1.08Entry
Canada×1.12Entry
Netherlands×1.15Entry
Japan×1.35Early
Taiwan×1.45Early
South Korea×1.55Early
Germany×2.0Mid
Italy×2.3Mid
Brazil×3.0Mid
UK×8.5Late
Switzerland×10Late
Australia×12Late
China×38Endgame
Moon×80Endgame
Mars×120Endgame

…and 20 more in between (Mexico, Argentina, Thailand, France, Portugal, Spain, Sweden, Norway, UAE, Turkey, Egypt, Singapore, Russia, South Africa, Nigeria, New Zealand, Ireland, India, Indonesia, Chile) for 35 total.

R&D

15 research nodes

The Research Lab opens at Level 6. Spend XP to level nodes (each to Level 3) across three tracks. Benefits compound with all your other multipliers.

Production track

NodeEffect (L1 / L2 / L3)XP cost
Blend Optimization−8% / −15% / −22% blend time60 · 140 · 280
Yield Boost+10% / +20% / +30% manual income60 · 140 · 280
Special Batches+5% / +10% / +15% special chance80 · 180 · 360
Workforce Efficiency+5% / +10% / +15% passive income80 · 180 · 360
Bulk Procurement+3% / +6% / +10% bulk discount50 · 120 · 240

Marketing track

NodeEffect (L1 / L2 / L3)XP cost
Fan Favorite Push+4% / +8% / +12% fan-favorite rate60 · 140 · 280
Golden Formula+2% / +4% / +6% golden chance80 · 180 · 360
Combo Mastery×1.05 / ×1.10 / ×1.15 combo bonus70 · 160 · 320
Global Outreach×1.03 / ×1.06 / ×1.10 country multiplier70 · 160 · 320
Staff Development+10% / +20% / +30% XP gain50 · 120 · 240

Operations track

NodeEffect (L1 / L2 / L3)XP cost
Hiring Pipeline−8% / −16% / −24% hire cost60 · 140 · 280
Crisis Management+10% / +20% / +30% event rewards60 · 140 · 280
Catering Expertise+15% / +30% / +50% contract reward80 · 180 · 360
Cost Reduction−5% / −10% / −15% upgrade cost70 · 160 · 320
Tax Optimization−3% / −6% / −9% tax80 · 180 · 360
